And by the way, in all these years, I probably have had three webinars that just died in the middle of the webinar. And or that one of them just didn't happen. So all you have to do is drop them in if the worst case happens. Email one goes like this, we've had technical difficulties, the webinar is canceled, we'll let you know shortly when we will do it again. Or email two, we've had technical difficulties, we're jumping to my backup service, join us there, here's the URL.

## [03:07 - 06:13]
